{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Goldsign
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Goldsign Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A Goldsign is a visible manifestation of a [[sacred artist]]'s status and [[Path]] once they have reached the [[Gold stage]] of advancement. It is created when an individual holds a [[Remnant]] within their core, serving as a practical way to identify which [[Path]] a person follows. These signs vary immensely in appearance and function, ranging from ornamental features like tattoos, halos, or wings to physical transformations such as metallic hair, claws, horns, or even facial scarring. Some Goldsigns appear as external constructs, such as blades of [[steel]], floating clouds, or animal-like parasites clinging to a limb, while others are more subtle, such as webs between fingers or specific eye colors. The nature of a Goldsign is often tied to the specific [[Remnant]] used during advancement. While many are practical tools that can be used for combat or specialized techniques, some may be purely aesthetic or even a permanent physical burden. The complexity and control an artist exerts over their Goldsign often correlate with their level of advancement, which is categorized into [[Lowgold]], [[Highgold]], and [[Truegold]]. Higher-level artists, particularly Truegolds, typically demonstrate much greater mastery over their signs. In certain circumstances, an artist may choose to suppress or withdraw their Goldsign to appear more ordinary.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A Goldsign serves as a method to identify an individual's specific [[Path]] once they reach the [[Gold stage]]. These marks manifest as miniature [[Remnant]] parasites on a person's limbs, appearing in various forms such as a venom-green cloud over the head or a wrap around the wrist. While some Goldsigns are physical features like a twisted, scarred face, others may appear as a bright red circle on the hand. These marks can range from subtle to hideous, and [[Yerin]]'s own Goldsign was known to flash during combat.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Goldsign]] is a way to tell who is on what [[Path]] at the [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Goldsign]] is a miniature [[Remnant]] parasite on an individual's limb.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Goldsign]] can be a venom-green [[Remnant]] wrapped around a wrist or a cloud over a head.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Goldsign]] can be a physical feature like a scarred and twisted face.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Goldsign]] is a bright red circle on the hand.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Goldsign]] is a mark that can be subtle or hideous.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] flashed during combat.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|In this world, a Goldsign serves as a necessary means of survival and functions as a type of status or power level. While Cassia utilizes a [[steel]] bracer known as a Goldsign, these marks can also be possessed without the need for a [[Remnant]]. [[Yerin]] possesses a Goldsign capable of blurring silver, though it was noted to be quivering during certain events. Ultimately, a Goldsign acts as a personal identifier or mark, such as a silver bracer, which [[Yerin]] utilizes.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Goldsign]] is required to survive in the world.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] was quivering.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Goldsign]] is a type of status or power level.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] can blur silver.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Cassias]] wears a [[steel]] bracer called [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Goldsign]] is a personal identifier or mark, such as a silver bracer.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Goldsign]] can be possessed without a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Goldsigns are two silver blades that hang on thin arms over the shoulders.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Goldsign]] can cause hair to become metal strands.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] and the [[Blood Shadow]]'s Goldsigns clashed, creating red-and-silver sparks of [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Goldsigns are constructs that [[Yerin]] has on her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Goldsigns are used by the [[Blood Shadow]] to drive into a target's body.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ziel]] has a condensed [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] uses Goldsigns to beckon a [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Goldsigns are unique entities capable of passing directly through armor plates. [[Yerin]] utilizes three distinct sets consisting of six Goldsigns in total, employing them to cycle through her movements. These Goldsigns manifest as [[steel]] blades growing from metal arms and can protrude from the back of her armor. While [[Yerin]] utilizes bladed versions for combat, [[Daji]] possesses a Goldsign breastplate.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Goldsigns can pass through armor plates.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] uses Goldsigns to cycle.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] stick out from the back of her armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] uses bladed Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has three sets of Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has six Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Daji]] has a [[Goldsign]] breastplate.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] look like [[steel]] blades growing on metal arms.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Arelius woman has Goldsigns that crackle with bright sparks on her knuckles.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s six Goldsigns are now a bright, vivid scarlet with a metallic gleam.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] did not have a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Goldsign]] can be a physical feature like extra weapons growing from the body or a decoration.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] flash in four directions.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]]'s [[Goldsign]] consists of sharp fangs of blue light and cheeks split deeply down his jaw.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Wei Shi [[Kelsa]]'s white-and-purple flaming tail was not the [[Goldsign]] she wanted.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] extended her Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kelsa]] exerted control over her [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses Goldsigns to launch [[Striker blades]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] releases her Goldsigns to resist spiritual pressure.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Pride]]'s [[Goldsign]] lines disappear into his robes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] had withdrawn their Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
